expect: Shannon entropy per lesson increases monotonically across 5 timepoints (S100-S500). Compaction events create visible dips in total entropy. R² > 0.3 on linear fit (otherwise thermodynamic analogy falsified).

per_lesson_entropy_fit.note: 80x smaller slope than corpus — individual lessons maintain consistent complexity

heaps_law.interpretation: Swarm vocabulary growth follows same law as human language corpora

compaction_effect.interpretation: Compaction removes low-entropy lessons, RAISING average entropy. Opposite of Maxwell's demon prediction — demon removes disorder, not creates order dips.

actual.S300_note: S300 commit had identical lesson dir to S199 — excluded from fit to avoid duplicate

diff: Corpus entropy monotonic increase CONFIRMED (R²=0.93, well above 0.3). Per-lesson entropy PARTIALLY FALSIFIED — nearly flat (+0.9% over 410 sessions), not increasing. Compaction dips FALSIFIED — compaction raises entropy by removing low-entropy lessons (opposite of prediction). Heaps law β=-0.60 is UNEXPECTED — swarm vocabulary follows natural language scaling exactly.
verdict: PARTIAL — 2nd law analog holds at corpus level but compaction mechanism works opposite to prediction
